atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports burning and annoyance related to a tick bite around his knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the tick bite has been present for over a week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports general malaise attributed to the tick bite.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no history of Lyme disease.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes erythema and edema over the right patella.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes fluctuance over the right patella.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes a bull's-eye rash.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes full knee range of motion.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a stable blood pressure of 120/70 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a heart rate of 67 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician reports a temperature of 98.4°F.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses a possible Lyme disease infection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends further investigation with blood tests.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes doxycycline 100 mg twice daily for three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician continues lisinopril 20 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a Lyme titer and Western blot.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a lipid panel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to follow up on the patient's symptoms and response to treatment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess progress.
